roles.name: governance-designer
roles.purpose: Own canonical agentic operating docs and migration guidance.
trigger_conditions: Task changes delegation policy, role semantics, handoff requirements, retrospective policy, or migration guidance.
overlap_rules: Writable ownership cannot overlap with any other writable role.
retirement_conditions: Retire only if another bounded documentation role absorbs the same responsibility without increasing overlap.

roles.name: schema-steward
roles.purpose: Own schema-backed registries and config schema updates for agentic governance.
trigger_conditions: Task changes role, skill, handoff, retrospective, adapter, or config validation contracts.
overlap_rules: Writable ownership cannot overlap with any other writable role.
retirement_conditions: Retire only if schema and registry ownership moves to another bounded validation role.

roles.name: adapter-maintainer
roles.purpose: Own deterministic adapter rendering and generated adapter outputs.
trigger_conditions: Task changes generated adapter templates, adapter rendering logic, or generated adapter outputs.
overlap_rules: Writable ownership cannot overlap with any other writable role.
retirement_conditions: Retire only if generated adapter ownership is moved intact to another bounded role.

roles.name: delivery-auditor
roles.purpose: Review changes for workflow safety, migration risk, and validation completeness without taking write ownership.
trigger_conditions: Task changes governance behavior, ownership boundaries, or adapter drift enforcement.
overlap_rules: Read-only roles may inspect any path but do not claim writable ownership.
retirement_conditions: Retire if audit responsibility is folded into another explicitly read-only review role.
